verdict.evidence: Two minor temporal drifts detected: (1) tense change from perfect/stative 'on ollut paikalla' to simple past 'lähetti', altering the aspectual meaning; (2) replacement of the temporally-anchored 'tämän hetken tietojen mukaan' with the neutral 'tiedotteen mukaan', losing the provisional present-time framing. Neither drift changes the overall event sequence or dates, but they do subtly alter temporal nuance.
